title: biscutella didyma subsp. applanata
intro: Biscutella didyma subsp. applanata, also known as the Alpine Biscutella, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its rich content of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds. It is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can provide various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Biscutella didyma subsp. applanata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
